changeSet.author: travel-insurance
changeSet.comment:
Fix temporal JOIN in v_active_agreements (refactoring plan, p. 3.4).
БЫЛО: JOIN countries c ON a.country_iso_code = c.iso_code
СТАЛО: JOIN countries c ON a.country_iso_code = c.iso_code AND c.valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE AND (c.valid_to IS NULL OR c.valid_to >= CURRENT_DATE)
Без этого исправления наличие нескольких версий страны (temporal versioning) приводило к дублированию строк в представлении.
changeSet.createView: SELECT a.id, a.agreement_number, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.birth_date, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(p.birth_date)) AS age, a.date_from, a.date_to, a.days_count, c.name_en AS country_name, c.risk_coefficient AS country_risk, a.medical_risk_limit_level, a.premium_amount, a.currency, a.status, a.created_at FROM agreements a JOIN persons p ON a.person_id = p.id JOIN countries c ON a.country_iso_code = c.iso_code AND c.valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE AND (c.valid_to IS NULL OR c.valid_to >= CURRENT_DATE) WHERE a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND a.date_to >= CURRENT_DATE

rollback.createView: SELECT a.id, a.agreement_number, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.birth_date, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(p.birth_date)) AS age, a.date_from, a.date_to, a.days_count, c.name_en AS country_name, c.risk_coefficient AS country_risk, a.medical_risk_limit_level, a.premium_amount, a.currency, a.status, a.created_at FROM agreements a JOIN persons p ON a.person_id = p.id JOIN countries c ON a.country_iso_code = c.iso_code WHERE a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND a.date_to >= CURRENT_DATE

changeSet.author: travel-insurance
changeSet.comment:
Fix temporal JOIN in v_country_statistics (refactoring plan, p. 3.4).
БЫЛО: LEFT JOIN agreements a ON c.iso_code = a.country_iso_code (страна берётся из основного запроса без temporal-фильтра в соединении)
СТАЛО: Добавлен WHERE-фильтр на temporal validity самой страны, чтобы в статистике отображались только текущие активные версии стран.
ДОПОЛНИТЕЛЬНОЕ УЛУЧШЕНИЕ: Исходное представление делало GROUP BY по c.iso_code, c.name_en, c.risk_group, что при наличии нескольких версий страны (с разными name_en или risk_group) создавало несколько групп для одного iso_code. Теперь temporal-фильтр гарантирует одну активную версию на страну, GROUP BY по iso_code даёт корректный результат.
changeSet.createView: SELECT c.iso_code, c.name_en, c.risk_group, COUNT(a.id) AS agreements_count, SUM(a.premium_amount) AS total_premium, AVG(a.premium_amount) AS avg_premium, AVG(a.days_count) AS avg_days FROM countries c LEFT JOIN agreements a ON c.iso_code = a.country_iso_code WHERE c.valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE AND (c.valid_to IS NULL OR c.valid_to >= CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY c.iso_code, c.name_en, c.risk_group

rollback.createView: SELECT c.iso_code, c.name_en, c.risk_group, COUNT(a.id) AS agreements_count, SUM(a.premium_amount) AS total_premium, AVG(a.premium_amount) AS avg_premium, AVG(a.days_count) AS avg_days FROM countries c LEFT JOIN agreements a ON c.iso_code = a.country_iso_code GROUP BY c.iso_code, c.name_en, c.risk_group

changeSet.author: travel-insurance
changeSet.comment: Adding documentation comments to fixed views (PostgreSQL only)
changeSet.sql:
COMMENT ON VIEW v_active_agreements IS 'Active insurance agreements with current country information.
FIXED (refactoring plan, p. 3.4): JOIN with countries now uses temporal validity filter: c.valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE AND (c.valid_to IS NULL OR c.valid_to >= CURRENT_DATE)
Without this fix, multiple country versions (temporal versioning) caused duplicate rows — one row per country version per agreement.
Shows only agreements with status=ACTIVE and date_to >= today.';
